SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-21-2011 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO NOV-22-2011 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. THE COURT DOES NOT ACCEPT THE PROOF OF SERVICE THAT THE PLAINTIFF FILED TODAY.
